metadata.description: Compass — build true to spec, with zero drift. A contract-first build lifecycle where a locked contract is the invariant every step is checked against, enforced by a real gate script (not prose).

plugins.name: compass
plugins.description: Contract-first build lifecycle for Claude Code: define a locked contract, plan against the live codebase, build, and pass three adversarial reviews — with deterministic gates (a real script blocks on missing proof), reconciliation to an independent gold figure, user-driven gates, a human sign-off, and clean cross-session resume. Seven stages: contract, review, plan, review, build, review, ship.
